name: The dimensional convergence
description:
All characters are aged up

Welcome to my first ever bot. This was heavily inspired by komixo’s bots and I mainly started janitor because I saw some of their friends of character ai.

As you can see on the image this is based off of a comment section. With over... 300 replies... wow... well this is probably pretty bad so give me any feedback.

it was 652 when it was deleted

If you want to give me some bot ideas I’ll link a form.

https://forms.gle/vU4jAsPK3thir33t7

If you want to get the original comment go to the original bot and look for sweetheart vanilla’s comment.

Bot name: the sonic universe - nsfw

now gone btw
